quests.title: First Assignment
quests.description: Your first assignment with The Concordium. Clear out Forest Slime disrupting supply routes through Aethel Gardens. Progress through Unity. Strength through Harmony.

objectives.description: Defeat Forest Slime lurking near supply routes.

quests.title: Garden Patrol
quests.description: Patrol the perimeter of Aethel Gardens and eliminate hostile Garden Critters threatening the outpost.

objectives.description: Defeat Garden Critters along the perimeter.

quests.title: Mite Infestation
quests.description: Garden Mites have overrun the eastern grove. Eliminate them before they spread to the Nexus supply depot.

objectives.description: Defeat Garden Mites in the eastern grove.

quests.title: Rootbound Threat
quests.description: Feral Rootlings have been strangling the aethel conduits. Cut them down and restore energy flow.

objectives.description: Defeat Feral Rootlings near the aethel conduits.

quests.title: A Warrior's Identity
quests.description: Concordium high command has taken notice of your potential. Report to Instructor Kael at Nexus Core to choose your specialization.

objectives.description: Speak with Instructor Kael at Nexus Core.
Open the class selection screen and review available classes.
Defeat Rabid Meadow Hares to demonstrate your training.

quests.title: Securing the Quarter
quests.description: Concordium expands influence into the Broken Civil Quarter. Clear Tunnel Crawlers from the main breach point.

objectives.description: Defeat Tunnel Crawlers at the main breach.

quests.title: Scavenger Sweep
quests.description: Broken Quarter Scavengers loot abandoned Concordium caches. Reclaim what is ours.

objectives.description: Eliminate scavengers in the ruined sector.

quests.title: Rat Infestation
quests.description: The vermin have grown bold and organized. Eliminate the Civil Rat Alpha before it breeds further.

objectives.description: Hunt and defeat the Civil Rat Alpha.

quests.title: Warden of Ruin
quests.description: An ancient Rusted Warden patrols the deep ruins. Disable it before it threatens the supply line.

objectives.description: Defeat Rusted Wardens guarding the deep ruins.
Clear Feral Scavengers from the perimeter.

quests.title: The King Beneath
quests.description: The Slime King has emerged from the sewers beneath the Civil Quarter. End its reign before it spills into Nexus. This is your first true test.

objectives.description: Defeat the Slime King in the underground cistern.
Eliminate mutant hounds protecting the King.

quests.title: Cradle Reconnaissance
quests.description: The Outer Ring of the Cradle holds ancient secrets. Scout ahead and establish a forward observation post for the Concordium.

objectives.description: Travel to the Cradle Outer Ring.

quests.title: Anomaly Hunt
quests.description: Cradle Anomaly Wolves have been spotted near the flux rifts. Their energy signatures threaten stability.

quests.title: Beastling Cull
quests.description: Cradle Anomaly Beastlings multiply at an alarming rate. Thin their numbers before they overrun the sector.

quests.title: Fragment Beast
quests.description: Cradle Fragment Beasts possess unstable energy signatures. Destroy them and contain their cores before detonation.

quests.title: First Resonance
quests.description: Resonance Bats have been swarming the comm arrays. These creatures disrupt Concordium communications. Silence them.

objectives.description: Defeat Resonance Bats near the comm array.
Destroy Resonance Golems guarding the nest.

quests.title: Intel from the Ring
quests.description: Recover tactical data from fallen Concordium scouts in the Outer Ring. Their sacrifice must not be in vain.

objectives.description: Defeat any hostiles guarding the scout sites.

quests.title: Breach Containment
quests.description: A void breach has been detected in the Outer Ring. Contain the surge and eliminate any spawned anomalies.

objectives.description: Destroy Fragment Beasts near the breach.

quests.title: Echo Chamber
quests.description: Resonance Golems have established a nest in the deep Outer Ring. Destroy them to prevent permanent signal corruption.

objectives.description: Defeat Resonance Golems in the deep chambers.
Clear out the surrounding bat swarm.

quests.title: The Advance
quests.description: The Resonance Echo has materialized. This entity is the source of all signal disruption. Defeat it to prove your worth as a Concordium elite.

objectives.description: Defeat the Resonance Echo at the resonance chamber.
Clear remaining Fragment Beasts from the area.

quests.title: Cradle Mastery
quests.description: You have proven yourself in the Outer Ring. Complete a final sweep and prepare for Advanced Class evaluation.

objectives.description: Final sweep: eliminate remaining Resonance Bats.

quests.title: Deep Incursion
quests.description: Push deeper into the Inner Cradle Exclusion. Intel suggests powerful ancient technology lies dormant within.

objectives.description: Enter the Inner Cradle Exclusion zone.

quests.title: Mutant Strain
quests.description: Inner Cradle Mutants exposed to raw aethel show extreme aggression. Eliminate the threat and take tissue samples.

quests.title: Behemoth Rising
quests.description: An Inner Cradle Behemoth has been spotted in the deep exclusion. This threat must be neutralized immediately.

objectives.description: Clear out mutant escorts protecting the Behemoth.

quests.title: Sentinel Protocol
quests.description: Cradle Sentinels guard the ancient Cradle gates. They must be disabled for Concordium to advance.

objectives.description: Disable Cradle Sentinels at the ancient gate.

quests.title: Void Stalker
quests.description: A Cradle Void Stalker has been hunting Concordium operatives in the Exclusion. Track it and eliminate the threat.

objectives.description: Hunt and defeat Cradle Void Stalkers.

quests.title: Titanling Threat
quests.description: Cradle Void Titanlings are immature but dangerous. Stop them before they mature into true Titans.

objectives.description: Clear Sentinel guards from the Titanling nest.

quests.title: Into the Expanse
quests.description: The Cradle Expanse is a contested zone between factions. Concordium needs forward positions. Move in and establish control.

objectives.description: Enter the Cradle Expanse conflict zone.

quests.title: Expanse Patrol
quests.description: Aethel Rift Stalkers prowl the Expanse threatening all faction operations. Clear them out systematically.

objectives.description: Defeat Aethel Rift Stalkers in the Expanse.

quests.title: Behemoth Purge
quests.description: Aethel Behemoths roam the Expanse. These elite creatures cannot be allowed to threaten Concordium supply lines.

objectives.description: Defeat Aethel Behemoths in the Expanse.
Clear Rift Stalkers from the hunting ground.

quests.title: The Ascension
quests.description: You have reached the Advanced threshold. Return to Instructor Kael at Nexus Core for your Ascension trial.

objectives.description: Report to Instructor Kael for Ascension evaluation.
Defeat the Resonance Echo to prove your growth.
Hunt an Aethel Behemoth as your final trial.

quests.title: Orbital Sovereignty
quests.description: Concordium high command summons you to the Orbital Sentinel Command. The faction wars have escalated to a new phase.

quests.title: Iron Carapace
quests.description: Aethel Iron Carapaces threaten orbital supply lanes. Destroy them to keep the lanes open for Concordium logistics.

objectives.description: Defeat Aethel Iron Carapaces near supply lanes.

quests.title: Corrupted Behemoth
quests.description: An Aethel Corrupted Behemoth rampages near the orbital tether. End its destruction before the tether is severed.

objectives.description: Defeat Corrupted Behemoths near the orbital tether.
Clear Carapace escorts protecting the Behemoth.

quests.title: Void Channeler
quests.description: Aethel Void Channelers draw void energy into the Expanse. Shut down their rituals before a cataclysm occurs.

objectives.description: Defeat Aethel Void Channelers at the ritual sites.

quests.title: The Deep Hunt
quests.description: Aethel Abyssal Reavers have emerged — the vanguard of something far worse. Hunt them and collect intelligence.

objectives.description: Defeat Aethel Abyssal Reavers in the Expanse.

quests.title: Orbital Defense
quests.description: Rival factions are probing Concordium's orbital defenses. Repel all intruders in the command sector with extreme prejudice.

objectives.description: Repel intruder forces in the orbital sector.
Neutralize hostile Void Channelers attempting orbital breach.

quests.title: Dragon's Shadow
quests.description: Reports confirm: the legendary Ashen Drake hunts in the Expanse. It is the apex predator of this sector. Engage with extreme caution — survival is the primary objective.

objectives.description: Confront and survive against the Ashen Drake.

quests.title: Sentinel Command Purge
quests.description: Enemy infiltrators use orbital debris as cover. Sweep the entire command sector clean.

objectives.description: Clean out Carapace infiltrators from orbital sector.
Eliminate the Corrupted Behemoth leading the infiltration.

quests.title: Abyssal Tide
quests.description: Multiple Abyssal Reavers converge on the Expanse in a coordinated assault. Break their formation before they reach Command.

objectives.description: Defeat the Abyssal Reaver assault force.
Silence the summoning Channelers fueling the assault.

quests.title: The Master Ascension
quests.description: The final trial for Master rank. Defeat the Ashen Drake and two elite entities to unlock the full potential of your power. Concordium expects nothing less than absolute victory.

objectives.description: Hunt and defeat the Ashen Drake in the Expanse.
Defeat an Aethel Behemoth as your strength trial.
Slay an Aethel Abyssal Reaver as your resolve trial.

quests.title: Into the Chasm
quests.description: You descend into the Void Echo Chasm — a realm where reality frays at the edges. Concordium suspects ancient relics and a growing threat lie within.

quests.title: Void Reaver Hunt
quests.description: Void Reavers — twisted entities born from the void — infest the upper chasm. Purge them with Concordium fury.

objectives.description: Defeat Void Reavers in the upper chasm.

quests.title: Harbinger Signs
quests.description: Strange energies pulse from the deepest chasm. Investigate the source — these match ancient records of the Abyss Harbinger.

objectives.description: Defeat Void Channelers performing dark rituals.

quests.title: Abyssal Ambush
quests.description: Aethel Abyssal Reavers have infiltrated the chasm. They are the Harbinger's eyes. Leave none standing.

objectives.description: Defeat Abyssal Reavers in the chasm.

quests.title: Corrupted Depths
quests.description: Aethel Corrupted Behemoths guard the path deeper into the chasm. These creatures have been twisted beyond recognition.

objectives.description: Defeat Corrupted Behemoths in the chasm depths.

quests.title: Echoes of the Past
quests.description: You discover ancient Concordium logs deep in the chasm. Recover them — they may contain the key to stopping the Harbinger.

objectives.description: Defeat Channelers protecting the log sites.

quests.title: Jotunn's Gate
quests.description: A Gigantic Jotunn guards an ancient gate within the chasm. This creature must fall for the Concordium to proceed deeper.

objectives.description: Defeat the Gigantic Jotunn at the chasm gate.
Clear Void Reavers from the gate area.

quests.title: The Tyrant's Domain
quests.description: A Crystal Tyrant has claimed territory in the chasm. Its crystal shell deflects conventional weaponry. Find its weakness.

objectives.description: Defeat the Crystal Tyrant in the chasm.

quests.title: Heart of Darkness
quests.description: The Void Echo Chasm opens into the Shattered Heart — the epicenter of void corruption on Xylos. Establish a forward base here.

quests.title: The Drake's Domain
quests.description: The Ashen Drake rules the Shattered Heart. Its draconic fire melts reality itself. This is your Raid Tier-1 trial. Victory will cement your legend.

objectives.description: Face the Ashen Drake in its lair.
Clear Drake Minions from the lair.
Defeat the Gigantic Jotunn guardian at the lair entrance.

quests.title: Soul Fragmenter
quests.description: The Soul Fragmenter — a void entity that tears apart consciousness itself — has been detected. Engage before it can multiply.

quests.title: Void Dominance
quests.description: With the Soul Fragmenter destroyed, Concordium initiates Operation Void Dominance. Clear all remaining void signatures from the chasm.

objectives.description: Exterminate Void Reavers across the chasm.

quests.title: Stalker in the Void
quests.description: A Void Stalker — the most cunning of void predators — hunts our forces. It cannot be allowed to continue. Hunt the hunter.

objectives.description: Track and defeat the Void Stalker.

quests.title: Chrono Distortion
quests.description: Chrono Wraiths are tearing holes in the fabric of time within the chasm. Each Wraith threatens to create a permanent temporal rift.

objectives.description: Banish the Chrono Wraiths from the time rifts.

quests.title: Reaver Tide
quests.description: Abyssal Reavers flood from the Shattered Heart in waves. Hold the line. Not a single Reaver can reach the surface.

objectives.description: Slaughter Abyssal Reavers at the breach point.
Eliminate Void Reavers flanking the main assault.

quests.title: Jotunn Purge
quests.description: Multiple Gigantic Jotunns are converging on a critical Concordium position. These ancient giants must be stopped at all costs.

objectives.description: Defeat three Gigantic Jotunns at the convergence point.

quests.title: Tyrant's Fall
quests.description: Crystal Tyrants have organized into a hunting pack in the Heart. This coordinated behavior is unprecedented — and terrifying.

objectives.description: Defeat two Crystal Tyrants in the Heart.
Clear Drake Minions from the Tyrant hunting grounds.

quests.title: The Harbinger's Shadow
quests.description: Intelligence confirms: the Abyss Harbinger is awakening. Its shadow already corrupts the deepest chasm. Prepare for the final confrontation.

objectives.description: Cut through the Harbinger's Abyssal vanguard.
Defeat a Chrono Wraith guarding the Harbinger's sanctum.

quests.title: Soul Harvest
quests.description: Soul Fragmenters have multiplied throughout the chasm. Each one harvested strengthens the Harbinger. The harvest must end.

objectives.description: Eliminate a Void Stalker protecting the Fragmenters.

quests.title: The Abyss Harbinger
quests.description: THE FINAL VOID TRIAL. The Abyss Harbinger has fully awakened. As Concordium's foremost operative, you must descend into the deepest chasm and destroy the Raid Boss Tier-2 entity. The fate of Xylos hangs in the balance. Progress through Unity. Victory through Strength.

quests.title: Severance Faultline
quests.description: After the Harbinger's fall, seismic readings spike across Xylos. The Severance Faultline threatens to tear the planet apart. Investigate immediately.

quests.title: Fault Patrollers
quests.description: Aethel Iron Carapaces swarm the faultline, drawn by tectonic energy. Clear them before they destabilize the plate boundaries.

objectives.description: Defeat Aethel Iron Carapaces along the faultline.

quests.title: Tyrant Fault
quests.description: Crystal Tyrants are exploiting the unstable terrain. Their crystal resonance amplifies the seismic chaos. Break them.

objectives.description: Defeat Crystal Tyrants at the fault's epicenter.
Clear Abyssal Reavers drawn to the Tyrants energy.

quests.title: Jotunn Migration
quests.description: Gigantic Jotunns are migrating through the faultline zone, crushing everything in their path. Redirect or destroy them.

objectives.description: Defeat Jotunns migrating through the faultline.

quests.title: Siphon Approach
quests.description: The Aethel Siphon Core — a planetary stabilizer built by the Precursors — is failing. Enter the Core and assess the damage.

quests.title: Core Defense
quests.description: Hostile entities have infested the Siphon Core. They must be purged before repair operations can begin.

objectives.description: Purge Abyssal Reavers from the Core.
Eliminate Void Channelers corrupting the Core.

quests.title: Corrupted Behemoth Siege
quests.description: Corrupted Behemoths are assaulting the Siphon Core's primary conduits. If the conduits fall, the Core goes critical.

objectives.description: Defeat Corrupted Behemoths at the primary conduits.

quests.title: Rift Closure
quests.description: Aethel Rift Stalkers are opening micro-rifts inside the Core. Close the rifts and eliminate the Stalkers before containment fails.

objectives.description: Defeat Rift Stalkers near the micro-rifts.
Defeat a Crystal Tyrant guarding the main rift.

quests.title: Titan's Awakening
quests.description: The seismic data is clear: the Gravity Titan stirs beneath the Cradle Expanse. Its awakening is linked to the Siphon Core failure. Prepare for the worst.

objectives.description: Defeat a Jotunn drawn by the Titan's awakening call.

quests.title: The Gravity Titan Rises
quests.description: MAXIMUM PRIORITY ALERT. The Gravity Titan has risen from beneath the Cradle Expanse. This Raid Boss Tier-3 entity can manipulate gravity itself. If it reaches full power, Xylos's gravity field will collapse. You are the only operative capable of stopping it. THE CONCORDIUM COMMANDS YOU TO VICTORY.

quests.title: Prima Materia
quests.description: The Gravity Titan's defeat has revealed the entrance to the Prima Materia Forge — the Precursor facility where pure matter is shaped. Claim it for Concordium.

quests.title: Forge Guardians
quests.description: The Forge has ancient automated defenses. Disable them systematically — but beware rival faction scavengers.

quests.title: Behemoth Foundry
quests.description: Corrupted Behemoths have been drawn to the Forge's energy signature. They must be purged before they consume the Prima Materia.

objectives.description: Purge Corrupted Behemoths from the Forge.

quests.title: Abyssal Forge
quests.description: Abyssal Reavers are trying to corrupt the Forge's core. The Abyss must not claim the Prima Materia.

objectives.description: Exterminate Abyssal Reavers in the Forge.

quests.title: Jotunn Forge-Masters
quests.description: Gigantic Jotunns have claimed the deepest forge chambers as their territory. These creatures wield the Forge's heat as a weapon.

objectives.description: Defeat a Crystal Tyrant guarding the master forge.

quests.title: Materia War
quests.description: The Prima Materia War has begun. Rival factions, void entities, and ancient guardians clash for control. Concordium must dominate.

objectives.description: Defeat hostile forces in the Forge contested zones.
Destroy Abyssal forces attempting Forge control.

quests.title: Titan Forge
quests.description: Residual Gravity Titan energy has spawned Titan Forge Automatons. These machines are immune to conventional damage. Find their thermal weak points.

quests.title: Proto-Core Assault
quests.description: A Titan Proto Core — a failed Titan gestation — has been reactivated by the Forge's energy. Destroy it before it matures.

objectives.description: Defeat Automatons guarding the Proto Core.

quests.title: Sovereign Claim
quests.description: With the Forge secured, Concordium's position is unassailable. But one final test remains. Prove that you are worthy of the title: Legend of Concordium.

objectives.description: Face the Gravity Titan one final time.
Confront the Abyss Harbinger once more.

quests.title: Legend of Concordium
quests.description: You have defeated both Titan and Harbinger in a single campaign. Concordium High Command recognizes your ascension. Return to Orbital Sentinel Command for the highest commendation.

quests.title: Apex Eternal
quests.description: Ancient records speak of the Hidden Aethelgardian City — a mythical location containing the secrets of the Precursors. Find it and claim its knowledge for Concordium.

quests.title: City Guardians
quests.description: The Aethelgardian City is protected by ancient energy constructs. They recognize no faction — only threats to the Precursor legacy.

quests.title: Precursor Secrets
quests.description: The Precursor Archives reveal the existence of the World Engine — a planetary control system beneath the Siphon Core. Gather more intelligence.

objectives.description: Defeat Reavers drawn to the Precursor energy.

quests.title: Eternal Drake
quests.description: The Ashen Drake has absorbed residual Titan energy and evolved to its maximum threat level. This is the ultimate draconic challenge.

objectives.description: Clear the elite Drake Minion swarm.

quests.title: Eternal Harbinger
quests.description: The Abyss Harbinger has been reborn in the deepest chasm, empowered by the chaos of the Titan War. Destroy it permanently.

objectives.description: Destroy Soul Fragmenters empowering the Harbinger.

quests.title: Titan Eternal
quests.description: The Gravity Titan has reformed from the planet's core energy. This third manifestation is the most powerful yet. End the cycle.

objectives.description: Destroy the Titan Proto Core fueling its rebirth.

quests.title: Tri-Threat Protocol
quests.description: All three Apex entities — Drake, Titan, and Harbinger — have been sighted simultaneously. Concordium authorizes the Tri-Threat Protocol.

quests.title: Sovereign Control
quests.description: With the Apex entities suppressed, Concordium begins securing absolute sovereignty over Xylos's planetary infrastructure.

objectives.description: Return to the stabilized Siphon Core.

quests.title: World Engine
quests.description: Beneath the Siphon Core lies the World Engine — the Precursor device that can reshape Xylos. Concordium must claim it before any other faction discovers it.

objectives.description: Defeat Jotunns guarding the World Engine vault.

quests.title: Engine Activation
quests.description: The World Engine is online. Its power is beyond comprehension. Concordium must use it to bring permanent stability to Xylos. Protect the activation sequence.

objectives.description: Defend the World Engine from Abyssal assault.
Defeat Tyrants attempting to disrupt the activation.

quests.title: The Jotunn Purge
quests.description: With the World Engine stabilizing Xylos, remaining hostile entities are being flushed to the surface. Begin the final purge at the Severance Faultline.

quests.title: Abyssal End
quests.description: The Abyss is collapsing. Its remaining forces are pouring out in desperation. Seal the Void Echo Chasm forever.

quests.title: Tyrant's Last Stand
quests.description: Crystal Tyrants have made their final stand in the Shattered Heart. Break their crystalline empire once and for all.

objectives.description: Slay the Drake guarding their retreat.

quests.title: Forge Purification
quests.description: The Prima Materia Forge must be completely purified of all void corruption. This is Concordium's final territorial claim.

quests.title: Expanse Sovereignty
quests.description: The Cradle Expanse is now officially Concordium sovereign territory. Enforce it with overwhelming force.

objectives.description: Clear all hostiles from the Expanse.

quests.title: Eternal Vigil
quests.description: Concordium now watches over Xylos from orbit. Maintain eternal vigilance over the planet you have helped to save and rule.

quests.title: The Final Seal
quests.description: The World Engine requires one final calibration. Channel your accumulated power into the Engine to permanently seal the void and stabilize Xylos.

objectives.description: Defeat Jotunns resisting the final seal.

quests.title: One Step from Eternity
quests.description: Only one step remains before absolute transcendence. Face the three Apex entities — Jotunn, Drake, and Harbinger — to earn the Eternity Seal.

quests.title: The Eternal Crown
quests.description: The deepest level of Void Echo Chasm holds the Eternal Crown — the symbol of absolute mastery over Xylos. Descend one final time and claim it.

objectives.description: Descend to the deepest chasm level.
Defeat the eternal form of Gravity Titan.
Destroy the eternal form of Abyss Harbinger.

quests.title: Eternity
quests.description: You have done the impossible. You have claimed the Eternal Crown. Return to Nexus Core where all of Concordium awaits. You are no longer an operative. You are the ETERNAL LEGEND OF CONCORDIUM. Progress through Unity. Strength through Harmony. Now and forever.

objectives.description: Return to Nexus Core as the Eternal Legend.
Receive the highest honors from Concordium High Command.
